name: bvdr-nightshift
description: Autonomous deep codebase audit with 2-level swarm. Level 1: 9 audit domains (security, dependencies, code quality, framework updates, architecture, test coverage, docs drift, performance, project health). Level 2: 6 enhancement agents (code simplification, documentation updates, logic diagrams, remediation planning, cross-domain correlation, PR code review). Features: sequential Opus agents, state persistence for stop/resume, dashboard report with executive summary, trend tracking, Slack summary, and Notion tasks.
